Experience refined executive living in this super deluxe fully furnished 2-master-bedroom apartment, located in a premium modern tower with direct access to King Fahad Road and stunning full open views.

This first-time rental offers a rare combination of luxury, privacy, and practicality; with elegant high-ceiling interiors, abundant natural light, and a spacious balcony overlooking King Fahad Road. Despite its strategic location, the apartment is exceptionally quiet thanks to excellent insulation and high construction quality.

The apartment features:
• Two spacious master bedrooms
• Private elevator access directly to the apartment
• Guest bathroom
• Elegant living and dining area
• Fully equipped modern kitchen with all appliances
• Smart entry system
• Super deluxe high-end furnishing

The tower is designed for upscale and peaceful living, with only two apartments per floor, ensuring maximum privacy and convenience. Residents also enjoy:
• Rooftop swimming pool and gym
• Private parking
• 24/7 Security

Perfectly positioned in one of Riyadh’s most connected locations:
• 5 minutes to Lulu Hypermarket and ORO Square (newly opened)
• 10 minutes to King Faisal Specialist Hospital, King Fahad Medical City, SMC Hospital, and View Mall
• Only 20–30 minutes to/from KAFD during rush hours, with notably smoother southbound access from KAFD compared to northbound traffic on King Fahad Road

Available immediately. Rent is negotiable depending on period & payment term

يتميز الموقع بقربه من مختلف الخدمات مثل السوبر ماركت، المطاعم، والمقاهي المتنوعة، كما يقع بالقرب من أبرز معالم مدينة الرياض السياحية والترفيهية، مما يجعله خيارًا مثاليًا للزوار، ورجال الأعمال، والطلاب.

نحرص على توفير أجواء من الراحة والخصوصية، مع خدمة متميزة طوال فترة الإقامة، ونرحب دائمًا بملاحظات واقتراحات ضيوفنا لتطوير خدماتنا باستمرار.

كما يسعدنا تقديم المعلومات والإرشادات عن أبرز معالم المدينة ووسائل التنقل، لمساعدتكم على الاستمتاع بإقامة سهلة ومميزة
